text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin doesn't clinch the win<n>at the Satsuki
Sho—the first race of the<n>Classic Triple Crown—but
she<n>mesmerizes the crowd with her<n>powerful
performance.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
In the stands is a young, redheaded<n>girl who is
moved to tears by her<n>incredible run.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin leaves the racecourse<n>to hone her
skills and prepare for the<n>next challenge—the
Japanese Derby.
